title: InsideBox Method, Spel Class
syntax: Function InsideBox (BoxNumber As Integer) As Boolean
parameters: BoxNumber	Integer expression from 1 to 15 representing which approach check area to return status for.
description: Returns the check status of the approach check area.
see_also:
Box

InsidePlane

InsideBox Example

VB Example:

Dim isInside As Boolean

isInside = m_spel.InsideBox(1)

C# Example:

bool isInside;

isInside = m_spel.InsideBox(1);
examples:
Dim isInside As Boolean
isInside = m_spel.InsideBox(1)
